layout.tagline: Layers of Love in Every Bite

hero.headline: Layers of Love in Every Bite
hero.description: SweetLayers Cakes is a boutique cake shop in Manila, specializing in handcrafted cakes for all occasions. Our cakes are combined with sweet flavors to deliver a dessert as beautiful as they are delicious. Owned by Clarrise Baustista, our shop is dedicated to providing unique and mouth-watering creations.

gallery.headline: Featured Creations
gallery.subheadline: A showcase of our most stunning and delicious cakes

items.title: Elegant Wedding Masterpiece
items.description: A 3-tiered wedding cake with intricate designs and flavors of vanilla and strawberry. This cake is a true showstopper, perfect for any wedding reception. With its delicate details and exquisite taste, it's sure to impress your guests.

testimonial.quote: The wedding cake from SweetLayers Cakes was absolutely stunning and delicious. Our guests couldn't stop raving about it! The attention to detail and the flavors were just perfect.
testimonial.author: Maria Rodriguez

items.title: Birthday Bash Cake
items.description: A fun and colorful birthday cake designed for kids and kids-at-heart. This cake features a chocolate base with cream cheese frosting and decorations of candy and sprinkles. It's the perfect way to make your birthday celebration even more special.

testimonial.quote: My son's birthday cake from SweetLayers Cakes was a huge hit! The kids loved the colorful design and the cake was moist and flavorful. We'll definitely be ordering from them again.
testimonial.author: John Lee

items.title: Anniversary Cake for Two
items.description: An intimate and romantic anniversary cake designed for couples. This cake features a rich red velvet flavor with cream cheese frosting and delicate decorations. It's the perfect way to celebrate your love and commitment to each other.

testimonial.quote: The anniversary cake from SweetLayers Cakes was the perfect way to celebrate our special day. The cake was beautiful and delicious, and the service was top-notch. We highly recommend them!
testimonial.author: Emily Chen

contact.description: For any inquiries or to explore your vision further, we invite you to contact our professional team using the details provided below.
